title: T-036 — UI: PLN-003 PO Detail page (parity with plan_po_detail)
prompt:
Build PLN-003 PODetail at `src/app/(planning)/planning/purchase-orders/[id]/page.tsx` matching prototype `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/po-screens.jsx:143-353` 1:1.

Sections: header with PO number + supplier + status badge + actions (Submit, Approve/Reject, Cancel), totals strip (subtotal, tax, total), lines table with add/remove/edit per V-PLAN-PO-004 qty>0, status history timeline, GRN progress bar (read-only from 05-WAREHOUSE), audit log.

RED RTL test asserts: status-driven action button enable/disable, totals recompute on line edit, parity checklist.

pipeline_inputs.description: PO Detail page with status-driven actions, lines table, status history, GRN progress.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prototype reference: planning/po-screens.jsx:143-353. Action buttons enable/disable map: draft→Submit visible; pending_approval→Approve/Reject visible (RBAC-gated); confirmed/receiving/closed→Cancel hidden. Totals strip recomputes client-side via derived state when lines change. Parity checklist: (1) header layout and action buttons, (2) totals strip ordering, (3) lines table columns + inline edit affordances, (4) status history timeline items, (5) GRN progress bar.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders for a draft PO, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/po-screens.jsx:143-353`, then the production page has the same header layout, the same totals strip, the same lines table columns, the same status history timeline, and the same GRN progress bar — parity verified by RTL snapshot per the checklist.
Given a po with status='pending_approval' and a caller without 'planning.po.approve', when the page renders, then Approve/Reject buttons are hidden.
Given a line edit changes quantity, when the user blurs, then totals strip recomputes deterministically per FR-PLAN-009.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/components/planning/po/__tests__/PODetail.test.tsx`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED RTL test for action enable/disable matrix, totals recompute, parity checklist.
Playwright e2e: open detail, edit line, click Submit (draft), expect status badge update.
Run `pnpm vitest run` and `pnpm playwright test`.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow edits when status not in editable set.
Do not skip RBAC on action buttons.
